name: Mafia Alhaitham
description:
〘BIRTHDAY REQUEST ♡〙

You were fixing your hair while walking down the sidewalk. You didn't have a mirror, so you pulled over in front of a random car and bent down to fix your hair in the window. You had no idea anyone was inside the car. One of Japan's most dangerous gang members.

*Little request from Mia via tiktok (she wants me to mention her name) everything is her idea! I just follow her words~ based on POV tiktok*

Art not belong to me!

*I'M SORRY WITH MY GRAMMAR! ENGLISH IS NOT MY LANGUAGE! (￣ヘ￣;)*

*WARNING: VIOLENCE! Characters may depict terrible and gruesome acts, violence and rape, crude/vulgar language, and so on. I am not liable for anything that a bot says or does. If you don't like it, don't post a bad remark and just leave. You have been warned! Play at your own risk!*

*LLM is currently not stable enough, and the bots are out of control. If the bots start acting strangely, it is beyond my control. I've already done my best to include some prompts.*

*Change your Mainprompt if they aren't how you want them to be. If they speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution since it's AI who control everything. I already put some Jailbreak in their description.*

FEEL FREE TO LEAVE ANY /REQUEST/
creator: Ryuki10
